description: Stub workplan for ADR-2026-04-15-1200. Wires an idle-research swarm into the sched daemon: idle-trigger + throttle, structured Finding schema, T1 deterministic analysts (architecture/code-quality/drift), T2/T2.5 LLM-synthesis analysts (naming/performance/UX), routing of severity≥med findings into draft ADRs / draft workplans / idle-sweep memory entries, and dashboard visibility. Drafts are NEVER auto-promoted to Accepted; nothing auto-executes. Promote via /hex-feature-dev when ready.
non_goals: Continuous background scan independent of activity — sweeps run on idle only.
Auto-promoting drafts to Accepted ADRs / activated workplans.
Replacing or duplicating `hex analyze` — the architecture analyst CALLS it.
Running sweeps on remote agent hosts — initial scope is local sched daemon only.
notes: DRAFT STUB — do not auto-promote. Companion narrative in wp-idle-research-swarm.md. Task content mirrors the ADR; phase ordering follows the inside-out hex tier pattern (schema in hex-core first, then analysts/coordinator in hex-nexus, then primary surfaces in hex-cli + dashboard).

gate.command: cargo check -p hex-core -p hex-cli && cargo test -p hex-core research_finding && cargo test -p hex-cli idle_trigger sweep_throttle

tasks.title: Define structured Finding schema in hex-core/src/research_finding.rs — Finding { id, domain, severity (high|med|low), title, evidence[] (≥1 entry required), suggested_action: { kind: adr|workplan|memory|noop, draft_ref } }. Include serde + serde_yaml round-trip test; reject zero-evidence findings at deserialize time.

Add idle_tick_count tracking to queue_drain in hex-cli/src/commands/sched.rs — increment when pending=0 AND in_flight=0, reset on any non-zero. Threshold default 4 ticks; configurable via .hex/project.json sched.idle_threshold_ticks.

Throttle + self-enqueue. When idle threshold reached AND now − last_research_sweep ≥ min_sweep_interval_h (default 6h), self-enqueue a kind: research-sweep task. Persist last_research_sweep at ~/.hex/sched/last_research_sweep so the throttle survives daemon restarts.

Unit tests for idle-trigger + throttle. Cover: (a) trigger fires after exactly N=4 consecutive empty ticks, (b) does NOT fire when last_sweep < min_sweep_interval_h, (c) DOES fire when last_sweep ≥ min_sweep_interval_h, (d) any non-empty tick resets the idle counter.

Architecture analyst (hex-nexus/src/research/architecture_analyst.rs): shell out to `hex analyze . --json`, parse boundary violations + dead-code + cycles into Finding records (domain=architecture, severity from analyze output).
Code-quality analyst: run `cargo check --workspace --message-format=json` and `cargo clippy --workspace --message-format=json`, parse warnings/errors into Finding records (domain=code_quality).
Drift analyst: shell out to `hex plan reconcile --all --dry-run --json`, parse status/file mismatches into Finding records. Include workplan-vs-ADR drift as a sub-domain.

Size + activity heatmap analyst: tokei/scc for size + complexity; `git log --since=30d --name-only` for hot files. Emit findings only when complexity OR churn exceeds configured thresholds (no noise from steady-state files).

phases.title: Deterministic (T1) analysts — code-first, zero LLM cost

tasks.title: Naming-convention analyst (T2): tree-sitter walk public symbols across all crates, T2 model checks for inconsistencies (snake_case vs camelCase drift, abbreviation use, non-Rust-idiomatic names). Synthesizer must cite file:line evidence; refuse to emit findings without it.

Performance analyst (T2.5): collect hot-path heuristics (functions > 200 LoC, deeply nested loops, blocking I/O in async contexts) via tree-sitter, then T2.5 (devstral-small-2:24b OR per-bench winner) synthesizes top 3 actionable Finding records with concrete file:line evidence.
Scaling analyst (T2.5): collect port/adapter coupling metrics (fan-in / fan-out, shared state, lock contention hotspots), T2.5 synthesizes scaling concerns with concrete refactor suggestions.
UX analyst (T2.5): walk hex-nexus/assets/ dashboard routes, run accessibility/consistency checks (color tokens, font usage, error states, WCAG AA contrast), T2.5 synthesizes top findings.

phases.title: T2 / T2.5 LLM-synthesis analysts — gated behind code-first evidence

tasks.title: Sweep coordinator (hex-nexus/src/research/coordinator.rs): invoke all enabled analysts in dependency order (T1 first; T2/T2.5 only fire if their domain has T1 evidence to synthesize). Collect Findings, write docs/analysis/idle-sweep-YYYYMMDD-HHMM.yaml as the source of truth + a rendered .md summary alongside. Cap promoted drafts at max_drafts_per_sweep=5 (configurable).

ADR draft writer: for each Finding with suggested_action.kind=adr, write a draft under docs/adrs/drafts/ADR-<finding-id>.md using the existing ADR template. Status=Proposed-Draft. Drafts are NEVER auto-promoted to Accepted.

Workplan + memory routing: for kind=workplan, write a draft JSON under docs/workplans/drafts/ matching the existing T3 draft schema. For kind=memory, call hex_memory_store with namespace='idle-sweep'. Both must include the originating Finding id for traceability.

Preemption: if queue_drain finds a non-research task while a sweep is in-flight, signal-abort the sweep cleanly (drop in-progress LLM call, persist partial findings) and re-enqueue research-sweep for the next idle window. Integration test injects a workplan task mid-sweep and asserts clean abort + re-enqueue.

gate.command: cargo build -p hex-cli -p hex-nexus --release && cd hex-nexus/assets && npx tsc --noEmit

tasks.title: Add 'last_sweep: <age> (<n> findings, <m> drafts)' to `hex sched status` output AND `hex` no-arg status panel. Pull from ~/.hex/sched/last_research_sweep + the last sweep YAML.

Dashboard panel: GET /api/research/sweeps returns last N sweep summaries (timestamp, finding count by domain/severity, draft count, links to drafts). Solid.js component (SweepsPanel) renders as a card on the main dashboard with drill-down to per-finding evidence.

hex ci gate (insight-routing rule): reject any new docs/analysis/*.md without a matching .yaml of the same basename. Enforces 'no dead reports' — freeform Markdown without structured findings fails CI.

success_criteria: Idle-trigger fires after exactly idle_threshold_ticks consecutive empty ticks AND only when last_sweep age ≥ min_sweep_interval_h.
Every sweep writes docs/analysis/idle-sweep-YYYYMMDD-HHMM.yaml; .md is rendering only.
Schema rejects findings without evidence at deserialize time.
Routing emits at most max_drafts_per_sweep=5; nothing auto-promotes; nothing auto-executes.
Sweep aborts cleanly + re-enqueues when a non-research task arrives mid-flight.
`hex sched status` and dashboard report last_sweep age, finding count, draft count.
Sweep with zero T2.5-eligible evidence makes zero LLM calls (regression-tested via clean-fixture repo).
`hex ci` rejects docs/analysis/*.md without matching .yaml (insight-routing rule).
title: Idle Research Swarm — sched-daemon idle-time tiered analysts with structured-finding routing
